{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aether telekinesis
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Aether telekinesis]] is considered a basic skill.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
